title: CAM, Trilegal, TT&A, Hogan Lovells act on Rentomojo proposed ₹150 crore+ IPO
description: Rentomojo Limited has proposed an initial public offering comprising a fresh issue aggregating up to ₹150 crore and an offer for sale of up to 28,399,567 equity shares.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas is advising Rentomojo and the Promoter Selling Shareholder, Geetansh Bamania, on this IPO.Trilegal is advising the selling shareholders, including Accel India IV (Mauritius) Limited, Edelweiss Discovery Fund - Series I, ValueQuest S.C.A.L.E. Fund, Madison India Opportunities V VCC, Chiratae Growth Fu
